text.title: Auto-Evict Tool Results Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion referencing a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Can any tool in the registry return more than N tokens (default 20k)?

branch.when: large_payload_possible == true AND storage_available == true AND read_tool_addable == true

conclusion.verdict: Install the eviction middleware with threshold N. Expose read_file(path, lines).

branch.when: large_payload_possible == true AND storage_available == true AND read_tool_addable == false

conclusion.verdict: Cannot use middleware — raise per-tool hard size caps in tool definitions instead.
Add scratch storage before installing middleware; eviction needs somewhere to write.
preconditions not met; route to correct methodology or skip.
